---
description: Cancel your Adobe agreement and return all subscriptions.
---

# Cancel Adobe agreement

This tutorial describes how to cancel your Adobe agreement by placing a termination order.&#x20;

An agreement can be terminated if you want to cancel all subscriptions within the specific agreement and end it entirely.&#x20;

The cancellation outcome depends on whether you are inside or outside the return period. For information on the policies, see [Downsize, termination, and return policies](../downsize-and-termination-policies.md).

### Prerequisites

Make sure that the agreement you want to terminate is currently active. Agreements in any other [state ](../../../modules-and-features/marketplace/agreements/agreement-states.md)cannot be terminated.

### Cancel your entire agreement

{% stepper %}
{% step %}
**Open the agreement to cancel**

To open the agreement:

1. Go to **Marketplace** > **Agreements**.
2. Select the agreement you want to cancel.
3. On the agreement details page, select the dropdown arrow <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="<svg xmlns=&#x22;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&#x22; height=&#x22;24px&#x22; viewBox=&#x22;0 -960 960 960&#x22; width=&#x22;24px&#x22; fill=&#x22;#5f6368&#x22;><path d=&#x22;M480-344 240-584l56-56 184 184 184-184 56 56-240 240Z&#x22;/></svg>" data-size="line">, then choose **Terminate**.
{% endstep %}

{% step %}
**Place the termination order for the agreement**&#x20;

In the guided **Terminate agreement** flow, complete the following steps:

1. **Items** – Check that all subscriptions show the new quantity as 0, then select **Next**.
2. **Order details** – Enter the reference information for the agreement and the termination order. Select **Next**.
3. **Review order** – Review the order details, go through the terms and conditions, then select **Place order**.
4. **Summary** – Review your order summary, then select **View details** to open the order details page, or select **Close**.
{% endstep %}
{% endstepper %}

### Next steps

Your termination order will be reviewed and processed by SoftwareOne.&#x20;

You can view the most up-to-date information on your order and its status on the order details page.
